A World Made for You
Only the one who holds the key may step inside
✦ ♡ ✦
✦   Written for You   ✦
Words That Live in My Heart

A best friend is one who walks in when the rest of the world walks out. She is the sister your soul always knew it had — the one who laughs at the same things, cries at the same movies, and understands every silence.

— Walter Winchell, reimagined

Friendship is the wine of life — the older it grows, the more perfectly it intoxicates the heart.

— Edward Young

She is my compass when I am lost, my laughter when the world feels heavy, my home when nowhere feels safe.

— Unknown

A real friend is one who walks in when others walk out, stays up when the world sleeps, and believes in you when you've forgotten how.

— Unknown

We didn't realise we were making memories, we just knew we were having the best time of our lives. And somehow, it always felt like home.

— Winnie-the-Pooh

There are friendships that imprint themselves upon your soul so deeply that no amount of time, no distance, no argument could ever truly separate what was built between two hearts that chose each other.

— For you, from me, always
✦   A Portrait of You   ✦
The Things That Make You Glow
🐱
Favourite Animal
The Cat
Graceful, independent, and endlessly charming — just like you. Cats don't follow rules; they write them, and so do you.
🖤
Favourite Colour
Midnight Black
Bold, mysterious, and timelessly elegant — black holds every colour within it, just as you hold every shade of strength and grace.
🎬
Favourite Movie
Theri
Heart, soul, and Thalapathy's magic woven into every frame — Theri is not just a movie, it's a feeling you carry forever.
🍗
Favourite Food
Chicken Rice
Warm, hearty, and soul-satisfying — a plate of chicken rice is all you need to make any moment feel like home.
👑
Favourite Hero
Thalapathy Vijay
The legend who rules every screen with grace, power, and a smile that lights up stadiums. Thalapathy is not just an actor — he is an emotion.
🎵 🎶 🎵 🎸 🎶
Orasaadha
🎵
Favourite Music
Orasaadha
A melody that touches every corner of the heart — Orasaadha is the song that plays when words fail and only music understands.
🌊
Favourite Place
The Beach
Where the waves meet the shore and the sky turns to gold — the beach is where your soul breathes freely and time stands still.
😴
Favourite Hobby
Sweet Sleeping
A true art mastered only by the wisest souls — you don't just sleep, you recharge like royalty, wrapped in dreams and starlight.
🍫
Favourite Dessert
Brownie & Ice Cream
Rich, fudgy brownie crowned with velvety ice cream — because you deserve every decadent, melt-in-your-mouth moment life offers.
🎂
⭐
— A letter to —
Happy Birthday, Shinyyyyy🤍
Born 27 · June · 2006  ✦  Happy 20th, Shiny — the universe celebrates you

Every year we share is a chapter I would re-read forever — a story written in laughter, late nights, silly secrets, and a friendship that feels like the rarest kind of magic. — Your Best Friend, for life ♡

🌹🥂🎊🎂🌸🦁💚🐱🎬✨🎉🌙⭐💛🎈🍗🍰👑
May this year bring you everything your heart has quietly wished for —
every dream, every joy, every moment that makes you feel truly alive.
